title: quercus agrifolia
intro: Quercus agrifolia, also known as the California live oak, is a type of evergreen tree that belongs to the white oak family (Fagaceae). The medicinal properties of Quercus agrifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Quercus agrifolia include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce the risk of heart disease, and improve digestion. Quercus agrifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
